case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS. MYTRUS, INCORPORATED

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SUMMARY JUDGMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYTRUS, INCORPORATED $39,877.83 PRINCIPAL, $7,981.04 INTEREST, $15,951.02 TAX PENALITIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $63,809.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
